productDisplayName: American Tourister Unisex Purple Messenger Bag
description: Style Note american tourister gives you this trendy bag for casual outings. Whether you are travelling and need your laptop or are just going out for a casual day out with your friends, you can sling this bag over your shoulders for an uber cool look. This bag works excellently as a college bag as well. With a water resistant lining, it's perfect for the monsoon. Product Details Purple bag with a Velcro flap closure, patterns on the flap and branding in front  Has one long adjustable twill tape strap with a padded, movable handle with branding on it  Has one main compartment with padded laptop compartment which has a Velcro flap closure, organiser sleeves and one zippered internal compartment  Warranty: 1 Year   Material and Care  100% polyester  Clean with a damp cloth when needed Size Height: 32 cm  Width: 34 cm  Depth: 6 cm
